AppendChild parent=1 child=3
CreateProcessingInstruction key=4 target="between" data=""
AppendChild parent=1 child=4

AppendChild parent=1 child=5

AppendChild parent=5 child=6

AppendChild parent=5 child=7

AppendChild parent=7 child=8

AppendChild parent=5 child=9

AppendChild parent=5 child=10
